abstract.text: Map style configuration.
Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and Metal.
A result builder that creates array of homogenous elements.
If element is missing, the resulting array leaves nil gaps.
Creates handlers that will be called when the map gestures such as Pan, Pinch, Rotate, Zoom and others happen.

is a general-purpose style with detailed road and transit networks.

The
style combines
the high-resolution satellite and aerial imagery of Mapbox Satellite with unobtrusive labels
and translucent roads from Mapbox Streets.
is a general-purpose style with 3D visualization.
